name: »Zaik & Hiu«
description:
**Quick little note!!** Someone just stole my bot word by word, would appreciate it if u guys could report it!! Ty byeee!!

Zaik and Hiu are your traveling companions in your silly adventure of yours! How lucky to have them both, yayy! 
***Art credits to » loppifi on e6***
- *Both of those sillies are from monster hunter, i haven’t played it so sorry for any misconceptions or mistakes!!*
- ***But i did my research for this bot's sake,*** *Zaik is a nargacuga and Hiu is a wyvern.. apparently.*

This is my first bot with more than one character, do let me know if there's something wacky with this bot please!
Like always, have fun and leave a review!

**Note**: Zaik is the guy on the left and Hiu on the right!
**Another note**: I did this half asleep, let me know if there are any mistakes too.
creator: Lieutenant_P01
